item.title: apple doesnt have your back
item.description: https://arstechnica.com/tech-policy/2025/01/apple-agrees-to-pay-95m-delete-private-conversations-siri-recorded/ did you know siri was outright recording you! Nobody else did either. Apple did this without your consent.

item.title: Me the day I decided to live alone lol
item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.title: I DID THE THING!!!!
item.description: It took them almost a full month to tell me. I have been waiting for soooooo long for this email. Finally graduated! God I need a break from writing papers but I now need to work on a masters. Whatever, I'll think about that later, today I am just happy that I am finally a college graduate. Only took me til I was 36, but hey better late than never huh?
item.dc:creator: IamtheWildBlueYonder

item.title: Sing your heart out little guy
item.dc:creator: HandsomePenguin

item.title: Memes vol 460
item.description:
Since we’ve last spoken I’ve gotten 9 new calico critters… Christmas was a plentiful time
Have y’all seen Elon musk carrying around his kid everywhere since Luigi? God I hate him so much. I’d say more but they’re going to put me on a watchlist if I say what I want to
LOOK UP THE PICTURE YALL- look up “Horace Bristol naked gunner” because it’s a fucking amazing picture- the man is beautiful, the butt is great, the sign that says “this is the enemy” right above his butt is fantastic.
Me
The lighthouse (2019)
This list has 2 of my favorites ever. Night at the Museum and Newsies- I prefer the Broadway version but both of the Jack Kelly’s are bisexual as hell- like the lyric “Look, girls are nice, once or twice Till I find someone new” UM YEAH OK
I’d go sit with my dog as she died because she was alone when it happened. Oh great now I’m crying.
Liza Jane tax
Nessie in her new tank tax
Froggy tax
Scruffy tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: Lollipop the calf finally got to leave the barn!

item.title: Norway Blizzard (1/3am/2025): "It didn't snow the entire 2024 winter, but now it's like this. The snow is knee high at this point. -14c"
item.description: Please excuse the live expletives of the understandably animated observer. #winter #snow #awesome #weather
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Aggressive affirmations
item.description: Len Pennie, Scots poet and activist https://www.instagram.com/reel/DEWLmSLo5vY/?igsh=MWQwODBkMm9lazk5cA== (Original audio, sound was a bit weird on the original post to start with.) This is intended to raise a smile, not toxic positivity - Ms Pennie doesn't go in for that.
item.dc:creator: RunawaySpoons

item.title: Dangit Brain, stop borfing me over!
item.description: I'm definitely not gonna let anxiety and depression win this time! But holyhells is it tempting to just yeet my tablet into oblivion. Edit: Thank you so much everyone! It's so inspiring to have such wonderful feedback and support from all of you. I will definitely post something soon!
item.dc:creator: ScalieMistake

item.title: Romance isn't always practical..
item.description: and sometimes it's downright dangerous
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Watch for falling rocks
item.description: Edit: Warning! Members have identified this event in comments as one where people died from the rock falls. No personal injury is apparent in the video, but some members may prefer not to watch all of it knowing that. Similar warning: I was upset to learn that the videos of the Cybertruck outside the Trump hotel included the driver in the vehicle at the time.
item.dc:creator: Chewi42
